'''Bivoli Tempari''' was a very expensive and sweet dish that consisted of toughened meat in a syrupy sauce.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Bivoli Tempari}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Bivolitempariold.png|thumb|left|100px|Bivoli Tempari's original appearance]]
In ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', some food and drink items like Bivoli Tempari got a new appearance after Publish 6, a publish which included a revamp to the Chef profession. The original appearance of Bivoli Tempari was that of a hunk of meat. All Bivoli Temparis made before Publish 6 were retroactively changed to the new appearance. The original appearance could still be found in some locations such as [[The Ranch]] on Tatooine. Later, the same appearance would be used as a dropped loot item from certain creatures.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Bivoli Tempari}}</ref>
